Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: Turkish rugs by pattern [300233484], rugs by pattern [300187593], rugs (textiles) [300185749], coverings and hangings by form [300185748], coverings and hangings by specific type [300185832], coverings and hangings [300205012], furnishings by form or function [300037342], furnishings (works) [300037336], Furnishings (hierarchy name) [300037335], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: prayer rugs [300186910], rugs by pattern [300187593], rugs (textiles) [300185749], coverings and hangings by form [300185748], coverings and hangings by specific type [300185832], coverings and hangings [300205012], furnishings by form or function [300037342], furnishings (works) [300037336], Furnishings (hierarchy name) [300037335], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Rugs with a symmetrical design and an arch at both ends, thought to have been made in Anatolia but so-named because many were found in Transylvania.
Úsese para alfombras con un diseño simétrico y un arco a ambos extremos, se cree fueron fabricadas en Anatolia, pero también llamadas así porque muchas fueron encontradas en Transilvania.
Kleden met een symmetrisch patroon met een boog aan elk einde, waarschijnlijk vervaardigd in Anatolië. Ze worden zo genoemd omdat er zoveel in de Transsylvanische regio zijn gevonden.
設計對稱、兩側各有一個拱形圖案的地毯，據信於安納托力亞製作，但因為在外西凡尼亞發現許多此類地毯而得此名。
Teppich mit symmetrischem Muster und einem Bogen an beiden Enden, von dem angenommen wird, dass er in Anatolien hergestellt wurde, aber so benannt, weil viele in Transsilvanien gefunden wurden.

Source.Source_ID: 2000003881/Balpinar and Hirsch, Carpets of the Vakiflar Museum (1988)

Term_Source.Page: Carol Bier, Curator -- Textile Museum, WADC -- 10/92
Carol Bier, Curator -- Textile Museum, WADC -- 10/92

Source.Source_ID: 2000003701/Bacharach and Bierman, Warp and Weft of Islam (1979)
2000023791/King and Sylvester, Eastern Carpet in the Western World (1983)
2000023791/King and Sylvester, Eastern Carpet in the Western World (1983)
2000051224/Fleming y Honour, Diccionario de Artes Decorativas (1987)

Non-Preferred_Term.Term_Text: t'e lan hsi wa ni ya ti t'an
te lan xi wa ni ya di tan
tè lán xī wǎ ní yǎ dì tǎn

Source.Source_ID: 2000114599/Yayla : Form und Farbe in türkischer Textilkunst (1993)
